name: Russ Feingold

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: "Today, I’m calling on Sen. Johnson to stand up for the working families of WI by announcing his opposition to the TPP.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: "Sen. Johnson hasn’t seen a trade deal he doesn’t love, and he’s supported every one that’s crossed his desk in the Senate.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: "If the TPP will only do more damage to Wisconsin communities, what more does Sen. Johnson need to know?” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “It’s a raw deal for Wisconsin families, and I oppose it in the strongest terms.” -RDF #Russ4Us  https://t.co/OFJb9lWUcj

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “They say TPP will build middle class and help working families, not just giant corps -- that’s what they said last time.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: "They say TPP will protect environment & respect environmental laws in participating countries, but they said that last time.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: They say the TPP has true protections for our workers, but that’s what they said last time.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: "The TPP is heading straight 4 us on a collision course. Congress, including Sen. Johnson, voted to put it on the fast track.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: "That’s 1 reason why I introduced the #InnovateWI plan… it's essential that we keep good jobs here.” -RDF  https://t.co/fVIkWRKcaS

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: "I find employers looking to hire, and young entrepreneurs starting innovative businesses.” -RDF #Russ4Us  https://t.co/ad3gdojDb9

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: "But it doesn’t have to be that way. It must not be that way.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: #Russ4Us  https://t.co/n4Zguzpihw

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “If you go to communities of different sizes across WI, you know the violence done by past trade deals is still felt today.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “It’s a fear that's real, because we’ve seen deals like NAFTA upend families and gut Wisconsin’s middle class.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “But not everyone in WI feels that kind of security… people worry that one day, their manager is going to announce layoffs.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “They’ve made a commitment there. And the community is richer for it.” -RDF #Russ4Us  https://t.co/Q4gTh5BY1x

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “… & if you have a job, having security of knowing that 1 of these big companies isn’t going to pull up stakes & go overseas.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “But no one issue has greater impact on a community than the baseline question of whether or not you can find a job...” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “The effects of not solving these problems hurt us all, and hurt the economy as a whole. All these things are connected.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “Like other economic strains, it doesn’t just affect one segment of people -- it ripples throughout our state as a whole.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “And the issue I probably heard the most about, in all 72 counties, was the cost of higher education.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “We must provide paid family leave… it's good for child, parents, and employers who will retain a happy, loyal employee.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “Example: increasing the min wage is not just long overdue… businesses fundamentally do better when people have $$ to spend” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: "They’re ready to get back to working together to build their families and communities.” -RDF #Russ4Us  https://t.co/80FtDLRNPc

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: "They wonder why people at the top are doing so well, but there’s no balance or fairness -- people just want some balance.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “Time and again, the major thing I hear is that people are having a hard time making ends meet and just paying their bills.” -RDF #Russ4Us

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: “If you take the time, people are willing to tell you what's going on in their lives.” -RDF #Russ4Us  https://t.co/HqFHasi10v

name: Russ Feingold
tweet: "I’ve kept traveling -- visiting all 72 counties last year, and I’ll visit all 72 again in 2016. I’ve enjoyed it immensely.” -RDF
